title: Implement conference roaming test
description: Test nodes entering/leaving the conference area, RPL route updates, announce propagation.
close_reason: Implemented full conference roaming test with dynamic SCALE_NODES, position-based enter/leave simulation for roaming, parameterized kill test, transmission stress for collisions, metrics export for RPL/announce/GPS/viz proxy validation. Fixed all codereview beads (P0 truncation, P1 validation, P2 flexibility, P3 magic numbers). Completed 3 independent codereview passes with all findings fixed and 3 final clean passes (no P0-P2). Updated test_scale.py:340-410.
